content: Negotiations with Irongate management resumed this week. The current agreement expires in January 2027, and the bargaining committee has tabled wage, healthcare, and overtime proposals. We'll post updates after each session.
excerpt: Where the contract talks stand as we head toward the January 2027 expiration.
title: Contract negotiations update — January 2027 expiration

content: Thank you to everyone who came out to the first-Tuesday membership meeting. We covered the bargaining timeline, the building fund, and the spring blood drive. Minutes are posted in the member portal.
excerpt: Recap of the first-Tuesday membership meeting and what was voted on.
title: Membership meeting recap — first Tuesday

content: Management's last proposal shifted more of the premium onto members. The committee is holding the line on the current cost-sharing split. Here is where the healthcare fight stands and what it means for your paycheck.
excerpt: An update on the fight to keep our healthcare premiums where they are.
title: Healthcare premium fight: where we stand

content: If you are called into a meeting that could lead to discipline, you have the right to ask for a steward. This is your Weingarten right. Memorize the line: "If this discussion could lead to my discipline, I request that a steward be present."
excerpt: A plain-language reminder of your Weingarten right to representation.
title: Steward corner: know your Weingarten rights

content: The retiree chapter meets the third Thursday of each month at the hall. This month we reviewed pension COLA news and the supplemental dental plan. New retirees are always welcome to join.
excerpt: Pension news and benefits updates from the Local 247 retiree chapter.
title: Retiree chapter news and benefits

content: Mark your calendars: the annual solidarity picnic and family day returns to Rouge Park. Food, music, kids' games, and the steward softball game. Bring the whole family and a covered dish to share.
excerpt: Save the date for the annual Local 247 solidarity picnic and family day.
title: Solidarity picnic and family day

content: A grievance moves through three steps before it can reach arbitration. We walk through Step 1 (supervisor), Step 2 (labor relations), Step 3 (plant manager), and what to expect at each stage.
excerpt: How a grievance moves from Step 1 all the way to arbitration.
title: Grievance procedure explained, step by step

content: After two near-misses on the weld line, the safety committee filed a complaint and walked the floor with management. New guarding and a refreshed lockout procedure are now in place. Report hazards to your steward.
excerpt: Safety committee wins new guarding and a refreshed lockout procedure on the weld line.
title: Weld line safety: committee wins new guarding

content: Applications for the Local 247 members' children scholarship are open. Two $1,500 awards go to graduating seniors. Forms are at the hall or in the member portal; deadline is the last Friday in March.
excerpt: Two scholarships are open for the children of Local 247 members.
title: Members' scholarship applications now open

content: The tentative agreement passed by a vote of 612 to 188. Thank you to every member who came out to read the language and cast a ballot. The new contract takes effect on ratification day.
excerpt: Members ratify the tentative agreement; here are the vote totals.
title: Members ratify the tentative agreement

content: The hall will be closed Thanksgiving week, reopening Monday. Steward office hours resume the following Tuesday. For urgent grievance deadlines during the break, call the after-hours steward line.
excerpt: Holiday hours and how to reach a steward while the hall is closed.
title: Hall holiday hours and steward coverage

content: Irongate announced a new electric-drive line for the south plant. We're working with management on staffing levels, training, and recall rights for laid-off members. More as the plan firms up.
excerpt: What the new south-plant electric-drive line means for our members.
title: New electric-drive line coming to the south plant

content: The financial secretary's quarterly report is posted in the member portal. Dues are steady, the building fund is on track, and the strike-readiness fund grew this quarter. Questions welcome at the next meeting.
excerpt: The quarterly treasurer's report on dues, the building fund, and the strike fund.
title: Quarterly treasurer's report: dues and funds

content: Workers at the Westside parts warehouse have asked Local 247 for help organizing. Our organizers are holding house meetings this month. If you know someone there, point them to our organizing page.
excerpt: Local 247 backs an organizing drive at the Westside parts warehouse.
title: Organizing drive at the Westside parts warehouse

content: This month's spotlight is on a 30-year assembler who has trained a generation of new hires and never misses a meeting. Members like this are the backbone of the local.
excerpt: A member spotlight on a 30-year assembler and mentor on the line.
title: Member spotlight: thirty years on the line

content: Local 247 endorsed candidates who back manufacturing jobs and collective bargaining in the upcoming county races. Find the full endorsement list and ride-to-the-polls signups in the portal.
excerpt: Our political action committee's endorsements for the county races.
title: Political action committee endorsements

content: Local 247 sent a delegation to the picket line at a sister local across town. An injury to one is an injury to all. Thank you to the members who showed up on a cold morning.
excerpt: Members walk the line in solidarity with a sister local.
title: Solidarity on the line with a sister local

content: The hall runs on volunteers. We need help with the food pantry, the newsletter, and game-day setup for the picnic. Sign up at the front desk or on the volunteering page.
excerpt: Ways to volunteer at the hall this season.
title: Volunteer opportunities at the hall

content: Seventy-five years ago, the workers at Irongate chartered Local 247. We look back at the 1951 sit-down, the founders, and the fights that built the contract we defend today.
excerpt: A look back at seventy-five years of Local 247 history.
title: Seventy-five years of Local 247 history

content: The Free Press ran a story on our healthcare fight and quoted two of our members. Read the coverage and share it with co-workers who aren't on the list yet.
excerpt: Local 247's healthcare fight makes the local news.
title: Local 247's healthcare fight in the news
